fields.label: Text Fields to Index (comma-separated)
fields.description: e.g. title, description, notes. If empty, it will try to find standard fields like subject, title, description, content.

fields.label: Index File Attachments
fields.description: Process and index attached PDFs, TXT, and DOCX files for this document.

fields.label: Ingest All Documents
fields.description: If unchecked, only documents matching the filters below will be ingested.

fields.label: Document Filter Query (JSON)
fields.description: Filters to apply when selecting documents. e.g. `{"stage": "CDR", "production_type": "Internal"}`

fields.label: Specific Documents (comma-separated)
fields.description: Specify explicit document names to ingest. e.g. `PT-COMP-0001, PT-COMP-0002`
